scenes.llm_reasoning: Rating: 4/10 - reason: The video lacks clear focus on specific components and does not showcase intricate work or close-up detail shots. The scene is repetitive and does not provide much value for the viewer interested in model building. The lack of environmental context is fine for a detail showcase, but the video does not provide enough detail or craftsmanship value to warrant a higher rating. The duplication of frames also detracts from the overall interest level. The scene could be improved by focusing on specific components
